arts.ttl: PSG Reopens Contract Talks with Donnarumma Amid Inter Milan Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have resumed efforts to secure Gianluigi Donnarumma's future with a new contract. The Italian goalkeeper, who joined PSG on a free transfer from AC Milan in the summer of 2021, is currently tied to the French champions until June 2026, earning up to €10 million net annually including bonuses. arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani's impact at Juventus has been nothing short of impressive since his arrival in Turin.
